text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have plans to eat lunch with Mejiro Palmer
today, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, really, just giving it a try is probably your
best bet.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I see... You know, Palmer, you never
disappoint. I'll let the folks in the shopping
district know the plan and go from there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! And y'know, you're quite the busy
bee yourself, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'm just doing what I can to pay back their
kindness. Anyway, sorry for interrupting your
lunch plans, you two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, the number of people coming to
Mejiro Palmer for advice doesn't let up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It won't be a walk in the park, but it'll really help
lighten the load for the general affairs committee
if you can pull it off.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...That never occurred to me. But yes, this would
be a good opportunity to streamline our
workflow.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I shall begin working on these amendments to the
manual at once.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You got that "take action" thing down pat! The
rest of the committee must really appreciate your
work ethic, Ikuno!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Listen... Can you hear all their happy voices,
saying how glad they are to be in the flower bed,
where they can grow nice and big?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I can! The flowers look happy dancing on
the breeze, too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for making me realize that it's no good
to stay sad and droopy just because I broke a
flower pot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There we go! That's the face I wanna see! You
have to keep on smiling so you can cheer the
flowers up too!

text_block_list.name: Cleaning Staff
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, I don't even remember why I was so
hung up on this. You're a lifesaver, Palmer!
Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who comes to Mejiro Palmer for advice
walks away with a relieved smile, including Tracen
students, staff, and even...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Located! Mejiro Palmer! Apologies for
approaching you right after your training!
choice_data_list: Hi, Director! Did you need me for something?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I hear you have been listening to those in need
and helping others broaden their perspectives!
That is truly commendable behavior!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
After seeing you in action with my own eyes, I
wished to ask you for some advice myself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! That's such a huge honor! I'd be happy
to help any way I can!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Which is why some students have been worried.
I definitely think there's more room for supporting
them.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Much gratitude! Your input has been most
helpful! Now, to incorporate those points into
future plans!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thank you too! I'm excited just hearing about
your new plan! I really think it'll help make our
school a better place!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whew... I sure carpe'd the heck out of this diem
after talking to so many people today!
choice_data_list:
You looked really happy while hearing
everyone out.

You looked really happy while hearing
everyone out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! For real? Well, I do like knowing about
how other people's lives are going.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And that optimistic look in their eyes when things
click into place just fills me with energy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's like when a spark sets their heart on fire, it
makes mine burn just as bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It makes me wanna work harder because I don't
wanna lose out to them, y'know?
choice_data_list: Since you're all fired up, how about a short run?

Sounds like you have great synergy with
people.

Sounds like you have great synergy with
people.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It makes me wanna work harder because I don't
wanna lose out to them, y'know?
choice_data_list: Since you're all fired up, how about a short run?

Sounds like you have great synergy with
people.

Sounds like you have great synergy with
people.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I like the way you think! All right, time to get this
party started!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... Phew! This is what I call living my best life!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle, rustle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Sounds like there's something in the
bushes...

text_block_list.name: Stray Cat
text_block_list.text: Meeeow...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh? And with a heavy heart by the sound of it.
Go ahead, spill the catnip tea.
choice_data_list:
Um, I know you're good at listening to others,
but that's a cat...

text_block_list.name: Stray Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow... Mrrreow, mow...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You lost your territory? You poor dear... But,
hey, what if you think of it another way?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, this is your chance to leap into a whole
new world!

text_block_list.name: Stray Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow!
choice_data_list: N-no way, did that really work?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is willing to lend a sympathetic ear
to everyone... even cats. It's been eye-opening
getting a glimpse of just how big her heart is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ah! That! That's what was on my mind just now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Stuff has a way of working out somehow... so
don't worry about me, 'kay, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You've been worried about me all day, haven't
you? 'Cause I was talking to so many people and
trying to solve all their problems?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I thought so. But whenever you see me
helping someone out, I want you to look at it like
this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Don't think I'm giving away my energy, look at it as me sharing my energy with people!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
How's that? Does that perspective help put your
worries to bed?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer extends a helpful hand to everyone
in the face of all kinds of dilemmas. I learn a lot
from her mindset.
